overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a marshy wetland during an overcast dusk. The character traverses tall golden reeds, crosses a wooden bridge over water, and continues along a dirt path as storm clouds darken the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh grassland with scattered water pools

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tall golden reeds toward a wooden bridge visible in the distance

entered.detail: dense golden-brown reeds surrounding the path on the left
dense golden-brown reeds surrounding the path on the right
shallow water pools visible between reed clusters on the left
shallow water pools visible between reed clusters on the right
cluster of trees with orange autumn foliage on the horizon
weathered wooden bridge structure spanning the marsh ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense tall golden reeds in an open marshland under dark storm clouds, approaching a wooden bridge structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk bridge over marsh water

events.description: character steps from tall grass onto wooden bridge over marsh water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a weathered wooden plank bridge flanked by wooden posts

entered.detail: weathered wooden support posts lining the left edge of the bridge
weathered wooden support posts lining the right edge of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a weathered wooden bridge spanning marsh water, with wooden posts marking the path and tall reeds lining both sides of the waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through wetland with autumn foliage

events.description: character steps off wooden bridge onto dirt path through tall grass
ambient light significantly dims as storm clouds thicken and dusk deepens

agents.ego_description: continuing along a winding dirt path surrounded by tall reeds and autumn-colored trees as darkness falls

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail winding through the marsh grass
dense cluster of trees with orange and brown autumn leaves

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge, the character walks along a dirt path through increasingly darkening marshland, with autumn trees on the right and golden reeds on both sides as the stormy sky grows darker toward night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden marshland that gradually descends into the deep shadows of a stormy twilight. It begins with the character wading through dense, tall golden reeds under a canopy of dark storm clouds, moving steadily toward a distant wooden bridge. As the character reaches the structure, the camera follows them across the weathered planks and past marking posts that span the marsh water. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the bridge to follow a dirt path, where the surrounding autumn trees and reeds are enveloped by an increasingly oppressive gloom. Finally, the landscape darkens further toward night as the stormy sky deepens in hue over the desolate wetlands.
